subject: Swift Trigger 715209 is not an astrophysical event
body:
V. D'Elia (ASDC), D. M. Palmer (LANL) and E. Troja (NASA/GSFC/UMCP)
report on behalf of the Swift Team:

Due to a known race condition in the Swift/BAT software, BAT 
misidentified Sco X-1 as an unknown transient (Trigger 715209). 

This is not an astrophysical event.
